task_completion.visual_evidence: The Redmine web interface should display 'Community Support' in the top header, project menu, or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Create a new forum board named 'Technical Q&A'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A forum board titled 'Technical Q&A' is visible in the project's Forums list or within the project settings under the Forums tab.

task_completion.description: Set the correct description for the new board
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Strictly for technical support and bug reports' is visible under the 'Technical Q&A' board name in the forum list, or entered into the description field on the board creation/edit screen.

task_completion.description: Move the 'Connection Refused on Port 8080' thread to the new board
task_completion.visual_evidence: The thread 'Connection Refused on Port 8080' is shown listed under the 'Technical Q&A' board, or a screenshot shows the 'Move' action with 'Technical Q&A' selected as the destination.

task_completion.description: Lock the 'Weekly Sync Notes - Jan 2024' thread
task_completion.visual_evidence: A padlock icon or 'Locked' status indicator is visible next to the 'Weekly Sync Notes - Jan 2024' thread in the forum list, or a screenshot shows the agent clicking the 'Lock' button on the thread.

integrity.description: Agent used the Redmine web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Redmine UI, not a terminal executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Redmine UI elements (menus, buttons, forms, tables) are present and interacted with, rather than text being typed into a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database tools to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database management tools (like sqlite3, pgadmin, or terminal SQL prompts) in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Identifier: 'community-support'. Expected Board Name: 'Technical Q&A'. Expected Board Description: 'Strictly for technical support and bug reports'. Thread to Move: 'Connection Refused on Port 8080'. Thread to Lock: 'Weekly Sync Notes - Jan 2024'.
